issues.description: SearchDeck with destination='board' is incorrect. The card effect places Character at the BOTTOM OF DECK, not on the board. Should use destination='deck' with position='bottom'.
maxCost should be 5 (matches 'cost of 5 or less'), but destination is wrong.
Second effect with trigger='Trigger' and maxCost=3 has no basis in card text. Only one Main effect exists: place up to 1 Character (cost ≤5) at bottom of deck. This extra effect should be removed.
